leadText: Smart Strike (Japanese: スマートホーン Smart Horn) is a damage-dealing Steel-type move introduced in Generation VII. It is: TM67 in Pokémon Sun and Moon and Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon. TM96 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM053 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Smart Strike inflicts damage and bypasses accuracy checks to always hit, unless the target is in the semi-invulnerable turn of a move such as Dig or Fly .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V The user stabs the target with a sharp horn. This attack never misses.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD RT DX It damages an enemy. It never misses.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] In Generation VII , Togetic could learn Smart Strike by TM , but its Evolution Togekiss couldn't. This was fixed in Generation VIII .
